specs: Verify that tiered inference routing dispatches T1/T2/T2.5 tasks to the correct local models and produces compilable output.

tasks.title: Rename a variable
Fix a typo in a comment
tasks.done_condition: Output contains `This is the main function`

tasks.title: Generate a fibonacci function
tasks.description: Write a Rust function `fn fibonacci(n: u64) -> u64` that returns the nth Fibonacci number using iteration (not recursion). Include a `main()` that prints fibonacci(10). Return ONLY valid Rust code, no explanation.

tasks.title: Generate a unit test
tasks.description: Write a Rust module with a function `fn is_palindrome(s: &str) -> bool` that checks if a string is a palindrome (case-insensitive, ignoring non-alphanumeric chars). Include `#[cfg(test)] mod tests` with at least 3 test cases. Return ONLY valid Rust code.

tasks.title: Generate a CLI argument parser
tasks.description:
Write a complete Rust program (single file, no external crates) that:
1. Parses command-line args: `--name <string>` and `--count <u32>` (both required)
2. Prints the name repeated `count` times, one per line
3. Prints a usage message and exits with code 1 if args are missing
4. Include a `parse_args` function and a `main` function
Return ONLY valid Rust code.
